title: lobelia physaloides
intro: Lobelia physaloides, also known as Chinese lobelia or Chinese pukeweed, is a plant species belonging to the Lobelia genus. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Lobelia physaloides can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs for its purported therapeutic effects.
